steps.title: Use the frequency clue
steps.content: The example is about the incidence of the word "day" and its ranking as the fifth most commonly used noun. The blank must mean how common or widespread a word is.

steps.title: Choose the frequency word
steps.content: A describes bold behavior, B means believable, and D means deeply meaningful. Corpus data measures frequency, so the fitting word means widespread. The answer is C.
